roa.docketEntryComment: GER INT SW-STERNBERGER/I;AJW/ISS;PROB3Y/PJ1Y/CTS132D/NOT/WS/OP RESTSA2;FROM ANGELO WONG-430 LAKE ST,MARK ASHWORTH,KEVIN MARCER,520 EUREKASA2;FROM DENIA RIVER,416 CASTRO ST/VF1/PC/PSR/ACCEPTS
GERM INT SW-A/SCHREIDER;CRT REJ DISPO;G PLEA S/A;NG PLEA REINSANY DISM CTS/ALLEG ARE ORD REINS,CAUSE IS REMANDED TO MC DEPT 10CONT TO 5/3/94 FUR PROC AT 9AM IN D10;DEFT REMAIN IN CUSTODY
CERT TO SUP CT, SEE DOCKET FOR PROPOSED SENT, B/S $50,000
CT REJECTS DISPO,ORD G PLEAS SET ASIDE & REINS ANY NG PLEAS OR DISM CTS
ADD TO CAL TO DECL CONF GTD, CONT TO 3-24-94 AS SET
